Generic targets are rejected: generated code cannot instantiate type
parameters.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config[T any] struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind"`
}

//fabrik:init
func Setup[T any]() error { return nil }

type DB struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func Open[T any]() *DB { return &DB{} }

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store[T any] interface {
	Get(key string) T
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Handlers struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:3:1: //fabrik:config cannot be on a generic type (Config has type parameters)
  help: configuration is loaded by reflection at startup; declare a concrete struct
error: store/store.go:8:1: init Setup cannot be generic (generated code cannot infer type arguments)
  help: declare a concrete setup function
error: store/store.go:13:1: provider Open cannot be generic (generated code cannot infer type arguments)
  help: declare a concrete constructor
error: store/store.go:16:1: //fabrik:provider:select cannot be on a generic interface (Store has type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete interface
